title: isoloma induratum
intro: Isoloma induratum, also known as Pilea microphylla, is a type of plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, characterized by its small, rounded leaves and woody stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Isoloma induratum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in folk remedies. Isoloma induratum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, with the leaves being harvested and dried for use in herbal remedies.
